message:
fix(raptorq,epoch): checked_mul for dense matrix alloc, consistent u32 cast

- decoder.rs: use checked_mul for n_rows*n_cols to prevent overflow on
  32-bit targets in both inactivate_and_solve variants (LOW)
- epoch.rs: replace `arrived as u32` with try_from for consistency with
  the arrived() accessor method (LOW)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
